capabilities: Implement gas optimization by combining storage packing with calldata specialization, using AI-derived knowledge bases to guide the process.

procedure.action: Profile storage layout by packing variables of smaller data types together using Solidity's storage slot mechanism; ensure no slot exceeds 32 bytes to minimize gas costs.

Specialize calldata by structuring function inputs to minimize data size; use ABI encoding to ensure calldata is tightly packed and aligned with expected input types using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

Leverage AI-prompted knowledge bases to identify common patterns in gas optimization; apply these patterns to refine storage and calldata strategies, ensuring compatibility with existing contracts using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.
Run automated tests using Truffle or Hardhat to verify that gas consumption is reduced; assert that gas_used < baseline_gas * 0.9 for optimized functions.

Log gas usage metrics and optimization results to a structured logging system; include function name, gas_saved, and optimization techniques applied for audit purposes using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

summary: Optimize gas usage in EVM Solidity by applying storage packing and calldata specialization techniques, leveraging AI-prompted knowledge bases for enhanced efficiency.
title: Gas Optimization via Storage Packing

failureConditions: Excessive gas usage when storage packing is improperly applied, causing misaligned slots and increased gas costs.
Function call failures when calldata is not correctly specialized, leading to ABI decoding errors and transaction reverts.
Inefficient optimization when AI-prompted knowledge bases suggest incompatible patterns, causing increased gas usage instead of reduction.
metrics: that gas_used < baseline_gas * 0.9 for optimized functions
all tests pass with optimized gas usage
successConditions: assert ABI.decode(calldata) matches expected input types; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
run Truffle test suite; assert all tests pass with optimized gas usage; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
